ModMetaData.name: Smart Subcores
ModMetaData.author: Oblitus
ModMetaData.description:
Install mechanoid subcores into buildings for verious improvements.
[h2]Features[/h2]
[b]Mining[/b] - Ground-Penetrating Scanner: Automated scanning with mineral targeting - Deep Drill: Continuous automated extraction
[b]Generators[/b] - Backup power control: Auto-toggle based on battery levels - Supports all vanilla and most mod-added generators - Toxifier converts pollution to wastepacks when automated
[b]Turrets[/b] - Enhanced combat performance - Reduced friendly fire risk
[b]Production[/b] - Hydroponics: Self-tending with integrated grow light - Biosculpter pods, growth vats, mech chargers, and more
[h2]Compatibility[/h2]
[b]Compatibile:[/b] - Turn It On and Off - RePowered (power management deferred) - Combat Extended (turret enhancements disabled) - Rimefeller (Resource Console support)
[b]Incompatible:[/b] - Better Ground-Penetrating Scanner (overlapping features)
[h2]Requirements[/h2] - Harmony
[b]Optional:[/b] - Biotech DLC (adds mechanoid subcores; without it, automation uses a crafted-component fallback)
[h2]Credits[/h2] - UnlimitedHugs: Remote Tech - idea of installable upgrades - Fluffy: Backup Power - inspiration for generator control - Owlchemist: Simple Fridge - refridgirated hoppers - Kikohi: Better ground-penetrating scanner - functionally integrated
